codeReview.summary: Reviewed JsonRepository implementation, tests, worker transcript skeleton, and commit diff. No high-confidence actionable bugs found in the feature commit relative to the stated requirements.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker spent substantial effort fighting Windows file-writing ergonomics because the skill lacks practical guidance for creating large multiline files in this environment.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges notes Create-tool friction on Windows, and the transcript skeleton shows many failed Create/Edit attempts before falling back to PowerShell/Python writes.

summary: Pass. The feature commit implements the required JsonRepository CRUD surface on top of JsonStore and CacheManager, covers the required behaviors with dedicated tests, and I found no high-confidence correctness issues in scope.
